In this case Jupiter has Rahu in the second house to him. Saturn is in the
4th and the Moon in the 5th. So, the native will suffer from excessive
uriq.ation, diabetes and wind troubles from his 48th year onwards. 38, 60,63

The native will have brothers and sisters. He will live upto 63 years.
